scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: node -e "console.log('Server has no build step (Node.js runtime).')"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix server run start" "npm --prefix client run preview -- --host"
